title: RP1 Agent-Ops Graphs
description: Sanitized project-operation graph package for RP1 agents and Claude Code.
privacy_boundary: Public derived graph: includes curated roles, safe relative paths, task routing, and command references; excludes raw thesis prose, raw data, logs, archives, copied external repositories, secrets, and private paths.

lanes.title: Orientation and Current State
lanes.heading: Where agents should start for current status, next steps, and repository navigation.

lanes.heading: Instruction files that define agent behavior, chapter roles, and evidence-status limits.

lanes.title: External Web Reference Copies

lanes.title: PDF Evidence Index
lanes.heading: Metadata-only PDF evidence manifests linking MCP literature lookup and local graphify citation gates.

lanes.title: Graph Tooling and MCP Routing
lanes.heading: MCP server wiring, local graph gates, and generated graph artifacts.
